title: calamintha nepeta var. byzantina
intro: Calamintha nepeta var. byzantina, also known as Dittany of Crete, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to Greece and Turkey. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate circulation, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing due to its high concentration of iridoid glycosides and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Calamintha nepeta var. byzantina include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, improve respiratory problems, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
